name: Benne Seed Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Sift the cornmeal together with the flour, salt and baking soda into a bowl.
3. Mix in the butter and cream.
4. Knead the dough until it holds together (6 to 8 times) on a floured board.
5. Roll the dough by the teaspoonful on the floured board.
6. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
7. Roll into very thin 4-inch diameter rounds, leaving the edges ragged.
8. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet until golden (about 15 minutes).
9. Sprinkle with salt while still warm.
10. Store in a tightly covered container.
11. Go well with cocktails and seafood soups.
